---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the OrangeLion theme
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem/motivation

A clear and concise description of the problem or need. What are you trying to achieve, and what is getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. For styling requests, mention the page or element (login card, header bars, connection list, admin settings) and any colour or layout details.

## Alternatives

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
